title: Peristera columbina
taxonomy: Peristera columbina is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which consists of orchids. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Peristera columbina belonging to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Peristera is also a part of this subfamily and is characterized by its unique flowers and growth habits. Peristera columbina is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a relatively small species of orchid, growing as an epiphyte in its natural habitat.
